column1: # shell-guard behavioural cases. Space-separated leading tokens; command = rest:
# Lines starting with # and blank lines are ignored.
# --- BLOCK: recursive delete of a protected path ----------------------------
diskutil_erase   2 -    diskutil eraseDisk JHFS+ X disk2
# --- BLOCK: halt / escalation / eval / chmod 777 / truncate / fork ----------
# --- BLOCK: network download piped into an interpreter ----------------------
# --- BLOCK: through common non-evasive wrappers + compounds -----------------
# --- ALLOW: false-positive controls + dropped-arm regression locks ----------
# --- ALLOW: deliberately option-value-wrapped evasion is OUT OF SCOPE --------
# (plain `timeout 5 rm -rf /` IS blocked; the `-s KILL` glued-value form is the
#  evasion variant we deliberately do not chase — plan mode is the backstop)
